{{Quote|The way I heard it, the fighting was over by the time we arrived. Three-Eye was actually handed over to us by a pair of Jedi Knights.|[[Lon Shevu]], to [[Ben Skywalker]]|<ref name="Invincible" />}}
'''Three-Eye''' was a pirate who preyed on shipping and vessels of [[RePlanetHab]], a massive corporation that worked to rebuild worlds devastated after the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Three-Eye took control of the [[Maltorian Mining Belt]] after the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Zekk]] left to go to the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] at the start of the [[Dark Nest Crisis]]. Sometime after Zekk's leaving, two other Jedi Knights were sent after him and successfully arrested him and handed him over to the [[Reconstruction Authority Space Patrol]], to which RASP would later say they had captured him themselves.
